overview: Cenegenics provides precision diagnostics and personalized age management programming designed to optimize healthspan and longevity biomarkers through data-driven assessment and concierge care.
highlights: In-home phlebotomy and measurement of 100+ biomarkers
Dedicated Performance Health Team with direct physician access
29+ years of leadership in performance health and longevity
targetAudience: Individuals seeking comprehensive longevity optimization and biological age assessment through precision diagnostics and personalized health programming.
